[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010111 4
1 0000000 a
2 1001000 2
3 1110100 4
4 1110110 5
5 0000110 2
6 1001000 2
7 0000100 1

01 10 0101110 4
12 21 0000010 1
23 32 1100000 2
34 43 1111111 a
45 54 1100100 3
56 65 1111100 5
67 76 0011110 4
70 07 0110101 4

71 17 0011011 4

47 74 0000110 2 match 5
50 05 1010111 5
61 16 0000101 2
72 27 0011001 3

37 73 1111001 5
